@if (mode === ReservationCreateEditMode.create) { {{ 'RESERVATION.TITLE_CREATE' | translate }} } @else { {{ 'RESERVATION.TITLE_EDIT' | translate }} }

@if (validationWarning) {
{{ validationWarning | translate }}
}

{{ 'RESERVATION.SELECTED_EQUIPMENT' | translate }}

@if (selectedEquipment.length === 0) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.NO_EQUIPMENT_SELECTED' | translate }}
} @else {
@for (item of selectedEquipment; track item.id) {

{{ item.model }}

{{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + item.equipmentType | translate }}

{{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }} {{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2' }}
}
@for (item of selectedEquipment; track item.id) {

{{ item.model }}

{{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + item.equipmentType | translate }}
{{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }}
{{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2' }}
}
@if (currentTotalPrice > 0) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.TOTAL_PRICE' | translate }}: {{ currentTotalPrice | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de-AT' }}
} }
{{ 'RESERVATION.ADD_EQUIPMENT_PROMPT' | translate }}
@for (type of [EquipmentTypeEnum.HELMET, EquipmentTypeEnum.POLE, EquipmentTypeEnum.SKI, EquipmentTypeEnum.SKIBOOT, EquipmentTypeEnum.SNOWBOARD, EquipmentTypeEnum.SNOWBOARDBOOT]; track type) { }
@if (currentActiveType) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.AVAILABLE' | translate }} {{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + currentActiveType | translate }}
@if (loading) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (!loading && availableEquipmentList.length === 0) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.NO_EQUIPMENT' | translate }}
} @if (!loading && availableEquipmentList.length > 0) {
@for (item of availableEquipmentList; track item.id) {

{{ item.model }}

{{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }}

{{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2' }}
}
@for (item of availableEquipmentList; track item.id) {

{{ item.model }}

{{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }}
{{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2' }}
}
}
} @if (submitError) {
{{ submitError }}
}
{{ 'RESERVATION.CONFIRM_TITLE' | translate }}

{{ 'RESERVATION.CONFIRM_PROMPT' | translate }}

{{ 'RESERVATION.CONFIRM_SUBTEXT' | translate }}
